title: Cuneiform Tablet #0238: Hellenistic Inventory
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Hellenistic period — a inventory document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Hellenistic period — a inventory document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Hellenistic period. Inventory document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records inventory matters typical of Hellenistic period administrative or literary practice.
